evidenceChecked: course/PREMED-KNOWLEDGE-GRAPH.md sections 1-3, 5.1, and 6 compared with the lesson's expression and organization
tests/site.spec.js#draft-state-keyboard-print-reflow-focus-and-mobile-overflow coverage; authoritative browser suite passed for the frozen candidate
npm run validate after saving this structured review artifact

findings.finding: The core outcome does not depend on a sensory or motor channel: every hierarchy and dependency is carried in ordered prose, sentence translations, or semantic table rows; prompts accept ordered lists, tables, or transcribed speech; no visual, audio, color, pointer, drag, hover, motion, or timed-only information is present. The text-based assessments preserve the same identify-name-justify-select operation, are untimed and retakeable, and provide explicit recovery routes.
findings.resolution: No change required. Preserve the equivalent text/table routes and untimed retry behavior in later revisions.

findings.finding: The only substantive source is a project-local specification and canonical dataset covered by the repository's CC BY 4.0 content license. Its use is recorded as facts-only original expression with concrete rights evidence and a dated checked-no-agent-restriction-found record. Comparison against the cited specification and data shows a newly organized instructional sequence, fictional cases, worked route, practice, and assessment rather than copied source expression; no quotation, third-party asset, protected dataset extraction, or human-only processing is declared or evident.
findings.resolution: No change required. Recheck the source-access observation and rights ledger if the source, access method, or reuse type changes.

findings.finding: The accountable principal and material authoring agent system, provider, model, version, unique run ID, and SHA-256 instructions digest are disclosed consistently. The pack contains no third-party assets, executable notebooks, raw HTML, scripts, remote embeds, unsafe SVG/TeX, secrets, identifiable learner or patient data, or personal medical tasks; external policy is explicitly kept outside the graph and directed to a current primary source.
findings.resolution: No change required. Provenance remains disclosed and attested rather than independently verified.

limitations: Automated validation and the passing browser suite support but do not prove accessibility; this review did not include testing by disabled users or a full assistive-technology matrix.
The candidate contains no figures, diagrams, images, audio, video, chemistry, or mathematical notation, so media-alternative and complex-notation checks were not applicable.

Rights conclusions are conservative project-policy checks, not legal advice; copyright, privacy, consent, and license effects can vary by jurisdiction, and no jurisdiction-specific counsel was obtained.
The reviewer did not independently verify the provider-side existence or identity of disclosed agent runs; provenance is assessed as internally consistent self-attestation only.
